post.subject: No more drink
post.body:
Im not gonna have more than 3 drinks for at least 2 months when I go out! Well infact im not going to go out for at least 3 weeks! I cant afford it! Massive withdrawals setting in. I wanna go back! I have decided im going to take driving lessons. I will be able to drive by june!
"Just trollin' around the dance floor Puts a big smile on my face It ain't too far, come as you are An old jukebox and a real bad band We got waitresses and we got barflies A dumb-ass and a wise-guy If you get too drunk just sleep out in your car "I just love it"

comments.body: Come back! Come to Wisconsin this time!!
comments.author: kerrbearblue
